info.name: CargoPulse API v1 — Full Scenarios
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for CargoPulse with seeded demo data support and end-to-end scenario folders.

**Environment Required:** `CargoPulse - Demo Seeded Data`

**Quick Start:** Run `00. Auth Setup (Run First) > Login as Cairo Admin` then explore scenario folders.

item.name: 00. Auth Setup (Run First)
item.description: Authenticate all persona tokens first. Run these in order before any scenario folder.

request.description: Clear tenant_admin_token. Re-run Cairo Admin login after this if needed.

item.name: 01. Core API Endpoints
item.description: Individual endpoint testing organized by domain. Use after running Auth Setup.

item.name: 02. Scenario: Full Tenant Onboarding
item.description: End-to-end flow: Super Admin creates a tenant, tenant admin configures settings, adds warehouses, merchants, and drivers. Run Auth Setup > Super Admin login first.

item.name: S2.2 Verify Tenant Appears in List
S2.7 Verify Driver in Fleet List
03. Scenario: End-to-End Shipment Lifecycle
item.description: Complete flow: Merchant creates shipment → Warehouse checks in → Admin assigns to route → Driver picks up → In transit → Delivered with signature. Uses seeded data where possible.

item.name: S3.1 Merchant Creates Shipment via API
S3.6 Assign Shipment to Route (State: Assigned)
S3.9 Driver Pings GPS During Transit
S3.12 Verify Final State via Tracking
04. Scenario: Driver Day-in-Life
item.description: Simulates a driver's shift: login, get manifest, start route, deliver multiple stops with GPS pings, end shift. Uses seeded Cairo driver.

item.name: S4.8 GPS Ping: En Route Stop 2
S4.10 GPS Ping: Return to Hub
05. Scenario: Cross-Tenant Isolation Audit
item.description: Security audit: Verify Tenant A cannot access Tenant B data via TenantScope. Uses seeded Cairo and Delta tenants.

item.name: S5.3 Delta Admin Lists Delta Shipments
S5.4 Cairo Admin Attempts to Access Delta Shipment
S5.5 Cairo Admin Attempts Delta Tracking Number

exec: pm.test('Public tracking still works cross-tenant', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: S5.6 Cairo Admin Lists Cairo Merchants
S5.7 Delta Warehouse Manager Attempts Cairo Invoice
S5.8 Super Admin Can Access All Tenants
06. Scenario: Billing & COD Reconciliation
item.description: End-to-end billing: Deliver COD shipment, verify ledger entries, generate invoice, confirm PDF. Uses seeded CP-CAI-005.

item.name: S6.1 Verify Seeded Delivered Shipment Exists
S6.2 View Merchant Ledger for COD
S6.5 Verify Invoice Aggregates Delivered Shipments
S6.7 Create New COD Shipment for Fresh Reconciliation
S6.9 Verify New COD in Ledger
07. Scenario: RBAC & Permission Boundaries
item.description: Verify spatie/laravel-permission enforcement across all roles. Each request uses a different persona token.

exec: pm.test('Error mentions permission', () => { var m = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(m).to.match(/forbidden|unauthorized|permission|ability|not allowed/i); });

item.name: S7.8 Merchant Creates Shipment via API Key (Allowed)
S7.9 Merchant Accesses Other Merchant Ledger (Forbidden)
S7.10 Tenant Admin Has Full Access
08. Scenario: State Machine & Edge Cases
item.description: Rigorous testing of spatie/laravel-model-states: legal transitions, illegal jumps, bulk operations, CSV failures.

item.name: S8.6 Legal: Picked Up → In Transit

exec: pm.test('Error mentions transition', () => { var m = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(m).to.match(/transition|invalid|illegal|cannot|not allowed/i); });

item.name: S8.11 Bulk CSV Import with Errors
09. Scenario: High Concurrency & Real-Time
item.description: Load testing: GPS ingestion throughput, Redis batching, Reverb broadcasting. Use Postman Runner with iterations.

item.name: S9.3 Simulate 100 Concurrent GPS Pings (Runner Loop)

exec: // Use Postman Collection Runner with 100 iterations to simulate concurrency

item.name: S9.4 Verify Redis Geospatial Index (via tracking)
S9.6 Verify Historical Breadcrumbs in DB

exec: // Run this request rapidly 20x to test Redis rate limiting

item.name: 10. Scenario: Webhook & Event Reliability
item.description: Test event-driven architecture: manual event firing, webhook delivery, retry with exponential backoff, failed job handling.

item.name: S10.2 Create Shipment for Webhook Test
S10.4 Check Horizon for Failed Webhook Job
S10.8 Verify Webhook Retry Backoff Config
11. Scenario: SaaS Subscription Gates
item.description: Verify hard limits enforced by subscription tier: driver caps, warehouse caps, feature flags.

item.name: S11.2 Attempt to Exceed Driver Limit

exec: pm.test('Error mentions limit/upgrade', () => { var m = pm.response.json().message || ''; pm.expect(m).to.match(/limit|upgrade|quota|tier|subscription/i); });

item.name: 12. Scenario: Search & Analytics Deep Dive
item.description: Complex queries: multi-filter search, sorting, pagination boundaries, date ranges, merchant-scoped analytics.

item.name: S12.5 Sort by Delivery Fee Descending
